pending.text: Your HVAC guy answers the phone on the first ring. You don't. That's why he books the jobs you miss. Want to know what 78% of customers actually do. #ServiceBusiness #HVAC #Plumber #LocalBusiness #SmallBiz

How many calls this week went straight to voicemail while you were busy on a job? Three? Five? The guy who answers first gets the work. Seventy-eight percent of people call the next contractor if you don't pick up. Send this to someone still losing jobs to their phone.

Your phone rings. You're in the middle of something. By the time you finish up and call back, they already booked someone else.

Sound familiar?

Here's what we know: 78% of people buy from whoever picks up first. Not the cheapest. Not the nicest. Whoever answers.

Most service guys are losing 3 to 5 calls a week because they're actually working. Can't blame you. But that's real money walking out the door.

We built something that answers your phone, books the job, and sends you the details. ...

You could keep refreshing job boards, or you could be the one getting calls.

Right now, people need their gutters cleaned, driveways pressure washed, lawns maintained. They're calling someone. Might as well be you.

Here's the catch: we handle the website, phone system, and booking. You show up and do the work. We take 20%, you keep 80%.

$450-$750/week is realistic for pressure washing. $300-$600 for lawn care. Real numbers, not promises.

Starting cost? Zero. You pay a small cut only when ...

Your boss just got a $2k bonus. You got a pat on the back. We'll give you the $2k instead—you keep 80% of every job booked through us. $0 to start, real work, real money. #ServiceBusiness #SideHustle #MakeMoneyNow #PressureWashing #StartupIdeas
